title: Polysphaeria maxima
intro: Polysphaeria maxima is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and malaria, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Polysphaeria maxima include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Polysphaeria maxima is commonly prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which are used to treat various health conditions.
